name: Jonathan Cruz
narrative: Educator and coach serving as Dean of Humanities at Austin Achieve Public Schools (Jun 2024-present) after teaching 8th Grade ELA there (Jul 2022-Jun 2024). Previously Reading and Writing Teacher and Grade Level Chair, plus Special Education Teacher - Reading, at KIPP Texas Public Schools; Middle School ELA Teacher at Cathedral School of St. Mary's. Bachelor's degree in Special Education and Teaching from St. Edward's University.
